heading: Consultation required
label: 4001a Consultation required
text: In developing the assessments, reports, and plans under the Harmful Algal Bloom and Hypoxia Research and Control Act of 1998, the Task Force shall consult with the coastal States, Indian tribes, local governments, appropriate industries (including fisheries, agriculture, and fertilizer), academic institutions, and nongovernmental organizations with expertise in coastal zone science and management.
notes: References in TextThe Harmful Algal Bloom and Hypoxia Research and Control Act of 1998, referred to in text, is title VI of , , , which is classified generally to this chapter. For complete classification of this Act to the Code, see Short Title note under and Tables.Pub. L. 105–383112 Stat. 3447section 4001 of this titleNov. 13, 1998
